signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes 10-20 yards from the LoS, inside the numbers
Receivers with this ability make sharper cuts and frequently win contested catches when covered by linebackers and linemen.
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes less than 10 yards from the LoS, inside the numbers
Defenders with this ability can make jumping, 180-degree interceptions while lurking in a zone in the middle of the field.
Players with this ability will recover from the effects of Wear and Tear and fatigue at an increased rate between plays.
Defenders with this ability have a greater chance of forcing fumbles when landing Perfect Hit Sticks
The most effective ball carriers prioritize maintaining possession over all else. When they enter the zone, no tackles made against them will result in a fumble.
Passers with this ability receive better blocking support on designed quarterback run plays.
Passers with this ability have faster passing animations when they are throwing under pressure
Ballcarriers with this ability have steerable juke animations.
Passers with this ability improve the catching prowess of all tight ends who are open on pass plays.
While in the pocket, passers with this ability are almost guaranteed to evade the first sack attempt by a blitzing defensive back.
Defenders with this ability are granted a free pass rush move once per play after spending stamina to perform one
Defenders with this ability use faster run shed moves for a better chance at shedding blocks against inside run plays.
Defenders with this ability will frequently prevent additional yardage gains while tackling
Defenders with this ability have better conservative/dive tackling, are rarely faked out by ballcarrier moves, and cannot be faked out when user-controlled.
Defenders with this ability force more catch knockouts and react quicker in any mid-field zone coverage, less than 20 yards from the LoS inside the numbers and 10-20 outside.
Defenders with this ability will cause increased fatigue penalties when tackling a ballcarrier with a non-conservative tackle.
Blockers with this ability reduce a rusher's chances of using a quick block shed move while run blocking.
Blockers with this ability gain blocker resistance points as a faster rate
Players with this ability can detect user-controlled defenders before the snap; as well as 3rd and 4th down blitzers. Can be bluffed.
Defenders with this ability have a greater chance of forcing fumbles when landing Perfect Hit Sticks
